diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Verrucous carcinoma of the paranasal sinuses
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: Diagnosis was obtained through multiple biopsies, including frozen sections taken from the posterior ethmoids which revealed a small focus of carcinoma-in-situ amid a large quantity of tissue consistent with verrucous carcinoma. The tumor was characterized by well-differentiated, cytologically bland, squamous epithelium with extensive parakeratosis and absent stratum granulosum. The base of the lesion showed rounded or bulbous rete pegs with broad pushing borders and an intact basement membrane.
